name: oh-my-docs
description: Document DOMAIN (not a work-style lane). Route here FIRST whenever the work product is a deliverable document — .pptx / .docx / .xlsx / .hwpx: intake, standardize (extract a style spec), plan, build, inspect, verify, revise, translate. Because the domain is unambiguous, this takes precedence over the work-style lanes (omc/sp/omx): document work enters omd, which then picks the exact docs-* STAGE and the right format card (references/formats/<format>.md is the single source of truth for tools/pitfalls/formulas). Heavy SUB-tasks inside omd (multi-source research, why-analysis, test-first tooling code) may still re-route to omc/sp.

skills.name: document-domain
skills.description: Representative signals that route to oh-my-docs (the session then picks the exact docs-* STAGE).
examples: 발표자료 만들어 / 슬라이드 생성 / 보고서 작성
extract a common style spec from existing documents
우리 랩 발표 양식 추출 / 표준 양식
이 PDF로 디펜스 자료 통째로 만들어
verify the final document (integrity + visual proofread)
